title: The Iron Giant Moves Again
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Vegapunk as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Edison... is it okay if I let Kaku go free?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want him to suffer the consequences of this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry, I won't let him go after the straw hats... and I don't think pursuing them will be his priority anyway!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: UNDER- STOOD, STUSSY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahim sorry for puttin' ya through all this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IT DIDN'T OCCUR TO ME THAT THEY WERE YEAR FRENDS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FORGVE ME FOR MAKING YA TURN ON 'EM!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Despite being torn between both sides, you still rescued us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That inner conflict is proof of your humanity, Stussy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Do as ya please...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just find a way to keep on livin'!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Two weeks after the flame fragment was stolen...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We observed an intense glow emamating from above the kingdom of Lulusia...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UUUSIA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I later got the news that the entire nation had mysteriously vanished without a trace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before long, my equipment registered the worldwide earthquakes I mentioned earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This might be my pride as a scientist talking, but I was certain of one fact...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: An ancient weapon did that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why would someone do that to luluia!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only the mother flame could supply the immense energy needed to cause this tragedy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Lulusia is gone?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the first we're hearing about this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: hurry and confirm it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My very own invention was used to power an ancient weapon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The motives and origin of the perpetrators are a mystery to me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But in the end, it all boils down to one hard truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am an accessory to this act of mass murder.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot express how remorseful I am for my part in this!! I am truly sorry!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But this proves my theory is plausible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The disaster that flooded the world was man-made!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Vegapunk!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's not your fault!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: HUUuh?! then PLUTION IS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shushh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONO- Suke!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There were once three great ancient weapons!!!

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
